testCases.notes: Grid view active (vc-product-card--view-mode--grid). Cards show image, name link to PDP, price. B2B-store theme has no inline 'Add to cart' button — qty stepper IS the add-to-cart entry point per project guardrail (feedback_qty_stepper_as_add_to_cart.md). Variation cards show '2 variations' button instead of stepper.
List view active (vc-product-card--view-mode--list / category-products__list--list). Single-column list layout, more detail per card visible.

Sort low-to-high $1.20→$2,000 verified by URL ?sort=price-ascending and product price ordering. High-to-low $3,243→$234 also verified. Category /alcoholic-drinks has 21 results — single page, no pagination available; sort persistence on pagination NOT testable in this category. Sort URL persistence (?sort=...) verified.
/Brands page HTTP 200, title 'QA & Brands', H1 'Top brands', 756 brand entries with non-empty href and label.

Yalumba brand page resolves cleanly: H1='Yalumba', breadcrumb='Home/Brands/Yalumba', 12 products all branded Yalumba (verified via card 'Brand: Yalumba' rows), facet filters present in sidebar. Note: 'Absolut' brand returned 0 products in current catalog — picked Yalumba as a populated brand.

testCases.title: Brand Product Count
testCases.notes: Skipped: prerequisite 'brand entry showing a product count badge or label' not met. The /Brands page in current Coffee theme renders brand grid with name+logo only, NO per-brand product count badge. Empty test scope per env-resilience guardrail. Verify with PM whether badge is intentionally disabled before reopening as bug.

testCases.title: PDP SEO - Meta Tags and Open Graph Tags
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] meta[name=description] is present with meaningful content (not empty); [DOM] link[rel=canonical] present with href matching current PDP URL; [DOM] meta[property=og:description] present and non-empty
testCases.notes: Verified on 2 PDPs (yalumba-y-series-chardonnay-unwooded-075l, efes-bottle-50cl). All 3 SEO failures replicated systemically: (1) meta[name=description] = empty string, (2) link[rel=canonical] absent from <head>, (3) meta[property=og:description] = empty string. og:title, og:image, og:url ARE present and correct. <title> tag present but generically prefixed 'QA & '. Pre-existing finding from prior aborted run attempt (CAT-040-pdp-seo-missing.png).

testCases.title: Category Page SEO - JSON-LD BreadcrumbList and Canonical URL
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] link[rel=canonical] present; [DOM] JSON-LD script tag present with @type: BreadcrumbList
testCases.notes: Verified on /alcoholic-drinks/wine subcategory: link[rel=canonical] absent; ZERO <script type=application/ld+json> tags emitted in <head>. Visible breadcrumb 'Home/Catalog/Alcoholic drinks/Wine' renders correctly but no structured data tag. Pre-existing finding from prior aborted run.

3-level breadcrumb verified: Home>Catalog>Alcoholic drinks → Home>Catalog>Alcoholic drinks>Efes Beer. Breadcrumb ancestor click navigates correctly back to top-level. URL slug updates at each level. Note: catalog includes 'Catalog' as parent landing page in breadcrumb (Home/Catalog/[Top-Level]) so the 2-item case in the spec sees 3 items including 'Catalog' — design choice, not defect.

Empty category state verified at /category/non-existent-empty-cat-test (falls through to Catalog landing): 'There are no results found' message visible, 0 product cards, no pagination, filter panel still rendered (with no facet values), 'Reset search' button visible. HTTP 200.

All Products mega-menu opens with 25 visible category links + 'Shop all categories' + 'Shop by brand' + 'New & Trending'. All have non-empty href and text. Class structure: .mega-menu__popover with linkCount=25.

Click on Bolts category in All Products dropdown navigates to /bolts. URL=/bolts (slug, no redirect), H1='Bolts Name EN' (33 results), breadcrumb='Home/Catalog/Bolts SEO EN'. Note: H1 uses display label, breadcrumb uses SEO label — admin metadata difference, not a defect.

testCases.title: Category SEO Slug URL Resolves Correctly
testCases.failedAssertion: [DOM] link[rel=canonical] href equals the current slug URL
testCases.notes: Slug URL /bolts resolves correctly without redirect to ID-based URL (urlIsSlug=true verified), heading non-empty ('Bolts Name EN'), products listed (110 cards). 4/5 assertions PASS. Failed assertion: link[rel=canonical] tag absent from <head>. Same systemic SEO defect as CAT-040/041 — see consolidated bug BUG_001_001.

At 768x1024 viewport (Edge): no horizontal scrollbar (docWidth=753), 3-column grid layout in grid view (cardWidth=148px), hamburger menu present, filter button accessible, sidebar facets visible. Switched from list→grid for tablet test. Screenshot at 001-evidence/CAT-056-tablet-768.png.

VCST-4728 regression: from /alcoholic-drinks/efes-beer, click 'Alcoholic Drinks' in main nav → breadcrumb correctly resets to 'Home/Catalog/Alcoholic drinks'. Subcategory name 'Efes Beer' absent from breadcrumb. URL=parent. H1=parent. No stale state.

VCST-4728 regression via Browser Back: from /alcoholic-drinks/efes-beer, browser Back → URL=/alcoholic-drinks, breadcrumb='Home/Catalog/Alcoholic drinks', no 'Efes Beer' stale reference. H1 matches parent.

VCST-4728 sibling navigation: efes-beer → click Alcoholic Drinks main nav → click Wine → breadcrumb correctly shows 'Home/Catalog/Alcoholic drinks/Wine' with NO trace of previous 'Efes Beer' sibling. URL reflects new sibling.

VCST-4728 determinism: rapid forward-back-forward (top-level → subcat → top-level → same subcat) → final breadcrumb correctly shows 'Home/Catalog/Alcoholic drinks/Efes Beer' matching final destination. URL=subcategory. H1=Efes Beer. No flicker, no stale state.

Configurable PDP at /products-with-options/configurations/agent-test-config-gift-box-20260327: H1 present, price=$50.00 (>0), 1 widget rendered (Gift Message Text section, optional, marked 'Personalize your selection further'), 'Add to cart' CTA present (configurable PDP shows Add to cart, not Customize, since the user is already on the configuration page), 26 product images loaded. Configuration sections render with labels. Bug guarded: this product has only Text section (no Variation/Product section).

Configurable variation selection on /products-with-options/configurations/agent-test-config-sale-bike-20260327 (which has Product/Variation section 'Handlebars'): selected Drop-Bar option → total price = $330.00; selected Standard-Handlebar option → total price changed to $290.00. Variation section displays 3 options (Drop-Bar $80, Standard $40, None $0) as radio inputs. SKU AGENT-TEST-BIKE-SALE-CFG-20260327 displayed (master configurable SKU — invariant for this product type; sub-options affect price/composition, not master SKU). Add-to-cart step omitted to avoid cart contamination — variation+price update assertion already satisfied per BL-CAT-006.

bugs.title: [Storefront] Systemic SEO failure: meta description, canonical link, og:description and JSON-LD BreadcrumbList missing/empty across PDPs and category pages
bugs.failedAssertion: [DOM] meta[name=description] non-empty; link[rel=canonical] present; meta[property=og:description] non-empty; <script type='application/ld+json'> with @type=BreadcrumbList present on category pages
bugs.stepsToReproduce: 1. Navigate to any PDP, e.g., https://vcst-qa-storefront.govirto.com/alcoholic-drinks/efes-beer/efes-bottle-50cl. 2. Open DevTools > Elements > <head>. 3. Inspect: document.querySelector('meta[name="description"]'), document.querySelector('link[rel="canonical"]'), document.querySelector('meta[property="og:description"]'). 4. Repeat on category page e.g. /alcoholic-drinks/wine; also inspect document.querySelectorAll('script[type="application/ld+json"]'). 5. Repeat on slug-based category /bolts.
bugs.expected: PDPs: meta[name=description] non-empty (product description); link[rel=canonical] present with href = current PDP URL; meta[property=og:description] non-empty. Category pages: link[rel=canonical] present; <script type='application/ld+json'> with @type=BreadcrumbList containing the visible breadcrumb hierarchy.
bugs.actual: PDPs (verified on 2 products): meta description = empty string; canonical absent from <head>; og:description = empty string. og:title/og:image/og:url present. Category pages (verified on /alcoholic-drinks/wine and /bolts): canonical absent; ZERO ld+json scripts emitted. Visible breadcrumb renders correctly but is not exposed as structured data.
